description: Letter addressed to a qāḍī. In Arabic script. The top ~10 lines are preserved. The first four lines are mostly blessings and standard formulae. The sender goes on to describe the difficult times in the 'village/estate' (ḍayʿa) and the 'country' (balad). Mentions an amīr and Abū l-Faraj. Reused for Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic literary text (between the lines and on the other side). The letter was written in Rajab, but the year is not mentioned. Needs further examination.
